column1: They just (walk) in the park and look rested.
I wondered what he (do) since we last met?
There (be) no post all this week. The postman (fall) ill.
Nick hoped there (be) no post since Friday.
Caroline looked very brown. She (be) to the Bahamas.
When I got to Jack’s house the police were there. Someone (steal) his car.
I found a baby bird in our garden. It (fall) out of its nest.
Tom’s father (be) an architect for twenty years.
The Browns (arrive)? – Tom said they (arrive) 40 minutes before. Why you (come) so late?
